name: Jamaican Cole Slaw
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the shredded cabbage, shredded carrots, and chopped walnuts in a large bowl; set aside.
2. Mix together the mayonnaise, sugar, cider vinegar, and dry jerk seasoning in a separate bowl.
3. Pour the dressing over the cabbage mixture and toss well to combine.
4. Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes before serving.
Nutritional information per serving: 177 calories; 3g protein, 8.5g carbohydrates, 16g fat (76%); 3.5g fiber, 8mg cholesterol, 197mg sodium.
